sentiment.reasoning: Missing revenue estimates by 8% is a clear negative indicator of current operational performance.

headlines.headline: Frelex Outlets revises long-term strategy with focus on cloud infrastructure

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
